item.title: AstraZeneca IL-33 Inhibitor (Copd)
item.description:
• Summary: AstraZeneca has reported a phase 3 win for its IL-33 inhibitor in chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (COPD), reinforcing its commitment to this therapeutic approach. The data supports the inhibitor's potential in reducing inflammation and improving outcomes in respiratory diseases.
  • MoAs: IL-33 inhibitors (e.g., tozorakimab) block interleukin-33, a cytokine involved in inflammatory pathways, to alleviate symptoms in conditions like COPD.
  • Sources: Fierce Biotech
